mapper.update: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS xeus.bigdata_analy_result${value} cascade;
mapper.select:
SELECT tbl.*,
st_asgeojson(grid._geometry) AS geojson,
st_asgeojson(st_centroid(grid._geometry)) AS geojson,
st_x(st_centroid(grid._geometry)) AS _annox, st_y(st_centroid(grid._geometry)) AS _annoy, grid._gid
FROM ${tbl} as tbl LEFT JOIN xeus.bigdata_grid_${GRID} as grid ON tbl.grid${GRID}_gid = grid._gid
AND ${col} in (${val})
AND ST_Intersects(ST_MakeEnvelope(${bbox}, 5186), grid._geometry)
${sortCol} ${sortTyp}
LIMIT ${limit} OFFSET ${offset}
